candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; matches top-line sales/revenue and is in the candidate list.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit revenue total from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; standard COGS-style line on the income statement.

variables.notes: Chosen as the closest direct cost / cost of sales line.

candidates.why: Personnel/overhead expense component above operating profit; fits SG&A components.
Operating overhead bucket above operating profit; appropriate SG&A component.
Explicit selling expense component, a classic SG&A item.
Explicit administrative overhead component, a classic SG&A item.
Dedicated R&D line exists, but it appears below operating profit in the preview, so it should not be included in XSGA under the placement rule.

variables.notes: CR:c||double. No single explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected overhead component rows above operating profit. Excluded R&D from XSGA because the only R&D row appears below operating profit, so adding it would violate the placement rule and risk misclassification.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line; although it appears below operating profit, it is still the best match for XRD.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. It appears below operating profit, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense component within financial expenses; recurring financing cost.
Another explicit interest expense component within financial expenses; recurring financing cost.
Total finance cost line, but should be avoided because underlying interest components are available and the total also includes FX/fair value items.
Could include recurring finance costs, but ambiguous and likely mixed with non-interest items; excluded in favor of explicit interest rows.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Looks like a supplemental duplicate of lease interest already captured by one of the explicit interest rows; excluded to avoid double counting.
Supplemental lease-interest line, likely overlapping with explicit interest rows; excluded to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: Used the granular recurring interest expense components and excluded total financial expenses because it includes FX/fair value items. Excluded supplemental lease-interest rows to avoid double counting, since their values appear to overlap with the explicit interest rows.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is preferred by the rules.
Total/common equity line, but less preferred because an owners-of-parent equity line exists.
Equity component only, not total book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity line to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Explicit non-controlling interest balance sheet line; best match for MIB.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests; included as lower-priority fallback if label changes over time.
Income statement allocation line, not a balance sheet minority interest balance.
Income statement allocation line, not a balance sheet minority interest balance.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as a priority list.
